titleStmt.title: SII 9.184: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 184. (A.R. No. 278 of 1925.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE RAMESVARA TEMPLE AT HANSI, KUDLIGI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 35 • • • • • Śrāvaṇa, śu. 5, Sōmavāra probably corresponding to A.D. 1111 July 12; Sōmavāra may be a mistake for Saumyavāra. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and mentions his feudatory Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirty two-thousand. It records the grant of some land and a portion of toll-revenue by the Mahāsāmanta Hoḷḷeya for the service of the god Paraśurāmēśvara of Hanase in Kōgaḷi five-hundred, for the feeding of ascetics and for education. The writer was the Sēnabōva Sōmanāthayya and the engraver the bronzesmith Kāsōja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvī
hārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka
kyābharaṇa śrīmattribhuvanemalladēvara vijayarājyamu
pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpā
jīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara kāṁcī
yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nija
mārttaṇḍa paricchēdigaṇḍa rājigacōḷamanōbhaṁga śrī
vanamalladēvapādābjabhriṁga śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara tribhuvana
pāṇḍyadēvaru nōḷaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsiramaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōda
mire . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmanta
samastaduṣṭārātikāḷānaḷa virōdhibaḷajaḷadhibaḍavā
murāri pagevaranāri poṇa(r)ḻdara bhīma caladaṁkarā
maleva dāyigaraṁ beṁkoḷva kūḍitappuva nāyaka
pracaṇḍadāyigaparabādhakadaḷīvanakuṁjara sa
turagarēvanta vairikritāṁta dāyigamriga
śrīparasurāmēśvaradēvalabdhavaraprasāda mriga
ghaṭṭiyaṁkakāṟa mallana siṁha sāha
mādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāsāmanta ho
ḷḷeyaṁ stiraṁ jīyāt . svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakāla 35 neya vi
vatsarada śrāvaṇa śuddha 5 mi sōmavāradaṁdu kōgaḷiya
ynūṟaṟa baḷiya nāyakavṛttiya hanaseya śrīparasu
rāmēśvaradēvara Aṁgabhōgasnānanivēdyakka
ḷakkaṁ Atithiyabhyāgatara tapōdhanara vidyārtti
hāradānakkaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ māṭakūṭa
svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhā
ṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpanna
rappa śrīmatu sōmakartthārapaṇḍitadēvara kālaṁ karcci
dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa datti cikkalabbegeṟeya
catussīmāsaṁbandhamenteṁdeḍe pūrvvauttaradakṣiṇadiśābhā
nīrvvariye mēre paścimadiśābhāgakke koṭṭūra pervvaṭṭe
gaḻde Alliṁ teṁka beḻdalu 200 Ā keyi
naṁdādīvigege gāṇadokkalu 1 Intī
sarvvabādhāparihāramāgi biṭṭanintī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisi
vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāgeyarghyatīrtthaṁgaḷalu sā
vileya kōḍu koḷagama navaratnaṁgaḷiṁ kaṭṭisi caturvvē
dapāragarappa sāsirvvaru brāhmaṇargge dānaṁgeyda phalama
Ī dharmmamanāvanorvvanaḷida(ṁ)nā tīrthaṁgaḷoḷu kavilmeyanā brā
ma konda pañcamahāpātakanakku . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē krimiḥ . bahubhirvasudhā bhuktā rājabhissagarādibhiryasya yasya
yadā bhūmi tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ © hanase 12 vri
ttiya samastaprajeyuṁ parigrahamuṁ dēvargge dēva gauḍa
dharmmakoḷaga mēṁṭiya sūḍuguyyala bhatta Ondu po
reyiṁ naḍasuvaru gāṇadokkalu gāṇadalu
reṇneyaṁ naḍasuvaru Ī śāsanavaṁ baredaṁ sēnabōva
sōmanāthayyaṁ khaṁḍarisidaṁ kaṁcagāṟa
jana maga dāsōja maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī .
kāḷāmukhasthānakartāramaṭha
nānādēsigapramukhavāgi biṭṭa dharmma
teṁdaḍe Aḍake Ettina hēṟiṁge 20 ttu kattege
Ele hēṟiṁge 100 ṟu talevorege 50 ttu meḷasu
hēṟiṁge soḷasa 2 ḍu I dharmmavappudu nāyaka
saludu mattaṁ herjjuṁkadavaru naṁdādī
paṇa 1 koḍuvaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.184 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
